title: Stability AI API keys should not be disclosed
description: Stability AI provides AI image generation models including Stable Diffusion. API keys are used to generate images, videos, and 3D assets via the Stability AI platform API. Exposing these keys allows unauthorized use at the account's expense and access to any private fine-tuned models.
recommendation: Remove Stability AI API keys from source code. Store in environment variables. Rotate immediately at platform.stability.ai/account/keys.
impact: Unauthorized image/video generation at your account's expense, access to private fine-tuned models, and potentially significant API cost abuse.

checks.message: Stability AI API key detected (sk- prefix). Stability AI API keys provide access to Stable Diffusion image generation, video generation, and other generative AI models. Exposing this key enables unauthorized image and video generation billed to your account, access to any private or fine-tuned models in your account, and potential abuse for generating prohibited content. Revoke immediately at platform.stability.ai/account/keys.

Stability AI API key detected in variable assignment. Stability AI provides Stable Diffusion and other generative AI models. Exposing this key allows unauthorized image/video/3D generation charged to your account and access to proprietary model fine-tunes. Rotate immediately at platform.stability.ai.
